prompt: Tap button seat before ICM-synthesis checkpoint action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before ICM decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The button is the right seat anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the late-acting seat that controls the pressure window.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Find the button because that seat acts last, and the late-position edge matters when you judge how much ICM pressure you can apply.
